Off Calendar Sep-26-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. ROBERT W. BIEDERMAN OF STEYER, LOWENTHAL BOODROOKAS & SMITH LLP, TEL. NO. 421-3400 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. SEAN E. PONIST OF THE LAW FIRM OF PETERSON, MARTIN & REYNOLDS LLP, TEL. NO. 399-2900 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANTS.

RULING -A R G U E D; THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANTS THOMAS ROBERTS AND MASON-MCDUFFIE REAL ESTATE, INCORPORATED'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT OR IN THE ALTERNATIVE SUMMARY ADJUDICATION - Motion for summary judgment is denied. Motion for summary adjudication is granted as to cause of action 7, otherwise denied. Plaintiffs have raised triable issue of material fact as to the scope of defendant's contractual and fiduciary duties to both seller and buyer of the real property in the underlying transaction. Prevailing party is to submit a proposed form of order pursuant to CCP 437 C(G). Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR # 7489 = (301/EHG)
